response.justification: Bogdan is a strong generalist software engineer with 15+ years of experience and genuine staff-level seniority, but the resume falls significantly short of the role's GenAI-specific requirements. His AI and agentic work only begins in April 2025 (his current role), far below the 8-year minimum for AI-driven solutions. Python is absent from his skills entirely, and there is no mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM performance tuning. The MCP code generator and agentic workflow work at re:cinq is directly relevant and promising, but it is too recent and too lightly described to compensate for the gaps at a Staff level.
strengths: Verified staff-level seniority across multiple companies with demonstrated ownership of complex systems
Direct hands-on experience with Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and agentic workflow infrastructure at current role — an explicit key technology in the JD
Strong data-pipeline and high-throughput microservices background (Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/second) relevant to production AI system design
concerns: Python is entirely absent from his listed skills and employment history — a primary required language for AI development in this role
No mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM performance metrics anywhere in the resume
All GenAI experience is confined to a single 2-month window (April–May 2025), against a mandatory 8-year AI-solutions requirement
